# sagemcom_port_forward (Resource)

IPv4 Port Forwarding rule resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Port Forwarding Rules for All Supported Protocols
#
# This configuration demonstrates how to define port forwarding rules for each
# of the nine protocol options supported by the Sagemcom Fast 5598 router:
# - "all"   (TCP - UDP)
# - "tcp"   (TCP)
# - "udp"   (UDP)
# - "both"  (BOTH)
# - "icmp"  (ICMP)
# - "gre"   (GRE)
# - "ah"    (AH)
# - "esp"   (ESP)
# - "other" (Other)

# "all" (TCP - UDP) - Forward both TCP and UDP traffic for a port range
# This also demonstrates restricting access to a specific remote IP address.
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "all_example" {
  description       = "All (TCP and UDP) Range Example"
  local_ip_address  = "192.168.1.50"
  remote_ip_address = "198.51.100.1" # Only allow connections from this remote source IP
  protocol          = "all"
  remote_port       = 8000
  local_port        = 8000
  remote_end_port   = 8010
  enabled           = true
}

# "tcp" - Standard TCP port forwarding (e.g., SSH host)
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "example" {
  description      = "SSH to Bastion Host"
  local_ip_address = "192.168.1.10"
  protocol         = "tcp"
  remote_port      = 2222
  local_port       = 22
  enabled          = true
}

# "udp" - Standard UDP port forwarding (e.g., DNS service)
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "udp_example" {
  protocol    = "udp"
  remote_port = 53
  local_port  = 53
  enabled     = true
}

# "both" - Another mapping for TCP and UDP traffic
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "both_example" {
  description      = "Both Protocols Example"
  local_ip_address = "192.168.1.53"
  protocol         = "both"
  remote_port      = 443
  local_port       = 443
  enabled          = true
}

# "icmp" - ICMP protocol port forwarding
# Note: For non-port-based protocols, remote_port and local_port are still
# required by the provider schema. They can be set to 0.
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "icmp_example" {
  description      = "ICMP Ping Forward"
  local_ip_address = "192.168.1.54"
  protocol         = "icmp"
  remote_port      = 0
  local_port       = 0
  enabled          = true
}

# "gre" - GRE protocol (IP protocol 47, e.g. for PPTP VPN tunneling)
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "gre_example" {
  description      = "GRE Tunneling"
  local_ip_address = "192.168.1.55"
  protocol         = "gre"
  remote_port      = 0
  local_port       = 0
  enabled          = true
}

# "ah" - AH protocol (IP protocol 51, IPSec Authentication Header)
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "ah_example" {
  description      = "IPSec AH"
  local_ip_address = "192.168.1.56"
  protocol         = "ah"
  remote_port      = 0
  local_port       = 0
  enabled          = true
}

# "esp" - ESP protocol (IP protocol 50, IPSec Encapsulated Security Payload)
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "esp_example" {
  description      = "IPSec ESP"
  local_ip_address = "192.168.1.57"
  protocol         = "esp"
  remote_port      = 0
  local_port       = 0
  enabled          = true
}

# "other" - Custom / other protocol
resource "sagemcom_port_forward" "other_example" {
  description      = "Other Protocol"
  local_ip_address = "192.168.1.58"
  protocol         = "other"
  remote_port      = 0
  local_port       = 0
  enabled          = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Description or name of the port forwarding rule.
- `local_ip_address` (String) Local IP address of the target machine on the LAN.
- `local_port` (Number) Local port to forward to on the target machine.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol to forward. Allowed values are `all` (TCP - UDP), `tcp`, `udp`, `both`, `icmp`, `gre`, `ah`, `esp`, and `other`.
- `remote_port` (Number) The port that the router listens on for incoming connections from the intenet.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Toggle state of the port forwarding rule. Defaults to `true`.
- `remote_end_port` (Number) Remote end port for port ranges. Defaults to `0` (indicating only a single port is to be forwarded).
- `remote_ip_address` (String) Remote IP address allowed to access. Defaults to `*` (any).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The internal ID of the port forwarding rule.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Port forwarding rules can be imported using their description:
terraform import sagemcom_port_forward.example "SSH to Bastion Host"
```
